name: Sweetened Condensed Milk

pros.title: easy to fit into everyday meals
pros.explanation: Convenience is one of dairy’s real category strengths.

pros.title: clear calcium identity
pros.explanation: That is part of why dairy still matters nutritionally.

pros.title: can provide useful protein support
pros.explanation: Even middling dairy foods usually help a bit on protein.

cons.title: concentrated sugar load overwhelms the dairy upside
cons.explanation: This is one of the clearest weak anchor cases in the category.

cons.title: not everyone tolerates dairy well
cons.explanation: That limits how universal the category can be.

cons.title: fat quality varies a lot by format
cons.explanation: The dairy label alone does not tell the whole story.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
